CONTENT.Career: Daschner signed his first professional contract with MSV Duisburg in April 2017. He made his 3. Liga debut for the club on 20 May against FSV Zwickau. On 17 August 2019, he extended his contract until 2021. In the 2019–20 season he scored 11 goals and made 5 assists in 34 3. Liga matches.In August 2020, Daschner joined 2. Bundesliga side FC St. Pauli having agreed a contract until 2023. The transfer fee paid to MSV Duisburg was undisclosed.
CONTENT.External links: Lukas Daschner at Soccerway.comLukas Daschner at WorldFootball.net

SUMMARY: Lukas Stephan Horst Daschner (born 1 October 1998) is a German professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or forward for Bundesliga club VfL Bochum.
